# `manifests` table schema

Per-benchmark task-count aggregates. Produced by `agent-diagnostics manifest refresh`.

Source of truth: [`src/agent_diagnostics/export.py`](../../src/agent_diagnostics/export.py) (`refresh_manifests`).

| Column | Type | Nullable | Description |
|--------|------|----------|-------------|
| manifest_id | VARCHAR | no | Sequential manifest identifier (e.g. ``manifest-001``). |
| benchmark | VARCHAR | no | Benchmark suite name aggregated in this manifest row. |
| task_count | BIGINT | no | Distinct task count observed in ``signals`` for this benchmark. |
| created_at | VARCHAR | no | ISO-8601 timestamp when the manifest row was generated. |
